{"story":{"id":14,"originalStory":"Little Tara was playing in her garden when she found a tiny bunny crying behind a flower pot.

Tara knelt down and asked, “Bunny, why are you sad?”

The bunny sniffled, “I lost my favorite carrot! It’s orange, shiny, and crunchy.”

Tara smiled. “Don’t worry, I’ll help you!”

They looked under leaves, behind rocks, and even inside a watering can.
Finally, Tara spotted something bright and orange sticking out of the soil.

“Here it is!” she said, pulling out the carrot.

The bunny hopped with joy. “Thank you, Tara!”

Tara gently patted the bunny.
“You’re welcome. Friends help each other!”

The bunny gave Tara a tiny hug and hopped away happily.","artStyleDecision":{"selectedStyle":null,"stylePrompt":null,"reasoning":null},"characters":[{"id":30,"name":"Tara","role":"main","description":"A kind-hearted girl who loves to help animals.","avatarPrompt":"A young girl with shoulder-length wavy chestnut brown hair, dimples, and emerald green eyes, wearing a light blue short-sleeve t-shirt and pink floral shorts.","avatarUrl":"/storage/avatars/tara_3b466179.png","avatarPath":"/Users/srinivas.dasari/Documents/workspace-2/story-agents/storage/avatars/tara_3b466179.png","customDescription":"A young girl with shoulder-length wavy chestnut brown hair, dimples, and emerald green eyes, wearing a light blue short-sleeve t-shirt and pink floral shorts.","hasReferenceImage":1},{"id":31,"name":"Bunny","role":"supporting","description":"A tiny, sad bunny looking for its lost carrot.","avatarPrompt":"A small fluffy white bunny with round bright blue eyes and pink ears, looking sad.","avatarUrl":"/storage/avatars/bunny_e983f373.png","avatarPath":"/Users/srinivas.dasari/Documents/workspace-2/story-agents/storage/avatars/bunny_e983f373.png","customDescription":"A small fluffy white bunny with round bright blue eyes and pink ears, looking sad.","hasReferenceImage":0}],"storyPages":{"title":"Tara and the Lost Carrot","summary":"Join Tara on her adventure to help a sad bunny find its lost carrot in the garden.","pages":[{"id":53,"pageNumber":1,"text":"Little Tara was playing in her garden when she found a tiny bunny crying behind a flower pot.","imageDescription":"Tara (young girl with chestnut brown hair and floral shorts); Bunny (small white bunny with pink ears and blue eyes) - ACTION: kneeling down, EMOTION: concerned. Tara, the girl with chestnut brown hair in floral shorts, is KNEELING down beside a flower pot, her brow furrowed and lips pursed with concern. Behind her, a colorful garden blooms with vibrant flowers, and a small white bunny with pink ears and blue eyes peeks out from behind the pot, tears in its eyes. Setting: In a colorful garden filled with flowers and plants.","charactersInScene":[],"illustrationUrl":"/storage/pages/Tara and the Lost Carrot_page_1.png","illustrationPath":"/Users/srinivas.dasari/Documents/workspace-2/story-agents/storage/pages/Tara and the Lost Carrot_page_1.png","customDescription":null,"regenerated":0},{"id":54,"pageNumber":2,"text":"Tara knelt down and asked, “Bunny, why are you sad?”","imageDescription":"Tara (young girl with chestnut brown hair and floral shorts); Bunny (small white bunny with pink ears and blue eyes) - ACTION: asking a question, EMOTION: curious. Tara, the girl with chestnut brown hair in floral shorts, is LEANING closer to the bunny, her eyes wide with curiosity and kindness. The bunny looks up at her, sniffing with its little nose, surrounded by vibrant flowers and green leaves, showing a heartwarming scene of connection. Setting: Beside the flower pot in the garden.","charactersInScene":[],"illustrationUrl":"/storage/pages/Tara and the Lost Carrot_page_2.png","illustrationPath":"/Users/srinivas.dasari/Documents/workspace-2/story-agents/storage/pages/Tara and the Lost Carrot_page_2.png","customDescription":null,"regenerated":0},{"id":55,"pageNumber":3,"text":"Finally, Tara spotted something bright and orange sticking out of the soil.","imageDescription":"Tara (young girl with chestnut brown hair and floral shorts); Bunny (small white bunny with pink ears and blue eyes) - ACTION: pulling out the carrot, EMOTION: excited. Tara, the girl with chestnut brown hair in floral shorts, is PULLING the shiny, orange carrot out of the soil with both hands, her face beaming with excitement. The bunny stands nearby, eyes wide in anticipation, with a backdrop of green grass and colorful flowers, capturing the thrill of discovery. Setting: In the garden, near the soil.","charactersInScene":[],"illustrationUrl":"/storage/pages/Tara and the Lost Carrot_page_3.png","illustrationPath":"/Users/srinivas.dasari/Documents/workspace-2/story-agents/storage/pages/Tara and the Lost Carrot_page_3.png","customDescription":null,"regenerated":0},{"id":56,"pageNumber":4,"text":"The bunny gave Tara a tiny hug and hopped away happily.","imageDescription":"Tara (young girl with chestnut brown hair and floral shorts); Bunny (small white bunny with pink ears and blue eyes) - ACTION: hugging, EMOTION: grateful. The bunny, with its small white body and pink ears, is HUGGING Tara tightly around her waist, its eyes sparkling with gratitude. Tara, the girl with chestnut brown hair in floral shorts, is smiling brightly, bending slightly to embrace the bunny. The garden around them is alive with colors, reflecting the joy of friendship. Setting: In the garden, surrounded by flowers.","charactersInScene":[],"illustrationUrl":"/storage/pages/Tara and the Lost Carrot_page_4.png","illustrationPath":"/Users/srinivas.dasari/Documents/workspace-2/story-agents/storage/pages/Tara and the Lost Carrot_page_4.png","customDescription":null,"regenerated":0}]},"cover":{"type":"cover","title":"Tara and the Lost Carrot","illustrationUrl":"/storage/pages/Tara_and the Lost Carrot_cover.png","illustrationPath":"/Users/srinivas.dasari/Documents/workspace-2/story-agents/storage/pages/Tara_and the Lost Carrot_cover.png"},"metadata":{"timestamp":"2025-12-28T12:03:50.000Z","pageCount":4,"targetAudience":"children","genre":null,"lastEdited":"2025-12-28T12:03:50.000Z"},"userId":null}}
